Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Request For Admissions And Form Interrogatories, 17.1
Off Calendar Feb-23-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Josephina Kogan's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Request For Admissions And Form Interrogatory 17.1 is granted in part and denied in part. The motion is granted as to Request For Admission Nos. 1 and 2 as the objections are overruled and ordered stricken. The responses otherwise may be adequate.
The motion is granted as to Request For Admission Nos. 3, 4 and 6-13. The objections are overruled and ordered stricken. The responses are otherwise inadequate as they do not set forth with specificity the matters about which responding party lacks sufficient information or knowledge and fails to state that reasonable inquiry has been made. The reservation of a right to present additional maters without limitation is not a proper response.
The motion is denied as to Request For Admission No. 5 as it is compound.
The motion is granted as to Form Interrogatory No. 17.1. The objections are overruled. The response is inadequate.
Further responses shall be made within 15 days of notice of this order.
The court finds that the responses and objections were made without substantial justification. Sanctions are imposed against Defendant in the amount of $900, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
